\tzpentry{ID5842}{Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5842 introduces Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{A}_{total}(\mathbf{r},t) = \mathbf{A}_{dipole} + \mathbf{A}_{gyro} + \mathbf{A}_{induced} \end{equation}
